action.reasoning: Observation: Starting from scratch. Analysis: Need to build a baseline Encoder-Decoder model for HMER. I will use DenseNet-121 as the encoder and a Transformer as the decoder. I will train for 2 epochs to verify the pipeline works and measure iteration time. Decision: Write dataset.py, model.py, train.py, and predict.py, then run training and submit eval.
